name: Puppet Parade
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>傀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>く</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>儡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぐつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>葬</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>儀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－パペット・パレード
desc: If your opponent controls more monsters than you do: Special Summon "Gimmick Puppet" monsters with different names from your Deck, up to the difference, then, if your opponent's LP are at least 2000 higher than yours, you can Set 1 "Rank-Up-Magic" Normal Spell directly from your Deck. For the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon monsters, except "Gimmick Puppet" monsters. You can only activate 1 "Puppet Parade" per turn.
eff: If your opponent controls more monsters than you do: Special Summon "Gimmick Puppet" monsters with different names from your Deck, up to the difference, then, if your opponent's LP are at least 2000 higher than yours, you can Set 1 "Rank-Up-Magic" Normal Spell directly from your Deck. For the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon monsters, except "Gimmick Puppet" monsters. You can only activate 1 "Puppet Parade" per turn.

summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
